title: KEEPALIVE_SECS and REQUIRE_SUBSCRIPTION silently fall back on parse error
description: Both env vars are parsed with .ok().and_then(|v| v.parse().ok()).unwrap_or(default). If an operator sets KEEPALIVE_SECS=five or REQUIRE_SUBSCRIPTION=yes, the parse silently fails and the default is used with no log output. The operator assumes their setting is applied. REQUIRE_SUBSCRIPTION=yes leaving subscription gating off is a business logic error. Fix: parse then warn! (or error!) if the value is set but unparseable, so misconfigurations surface in the startup log.
